name: Stuffed Mushrooms, Italian Style
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp salad or olive oil, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Rinse mushrooms and pat dry. Remove stems; reserve for later use.
3. Brush the outsides of the mushroom caps with 4 tablespoons of oil and sprinkle lightly with salt.
4. Place the cavity side up in a shallow baking pan.
5. Chop the stems very fine (about 1 cup). Mix with bread crumbs, cheese, 1/2 teaspoon salt, onion powder, and basil.
6. Stir in the egg.
7. Spoon the mixture into the mushroom caps.
8. Dribble with the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil.
9. Bake for 30 minutes. Serve hot.
